problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
